name: Guangzhou Pearl River Industrial Development Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangzhou Pearl River Industrial Development Co., Ltd. operates as a real estate development company in China. It engages in property investment, property management, and other businesses. The company develops, sells, and leases commercial and residential properties; develops office building, hotel, tourism, health, and other commercial real estate properties; and provides related after-sale services for office and supporting facilities. It also engages in the hotel management, wholesale and retail trading, parking lot management, venue rental, swimming pool and fitness room operation, and tourism businesses. The company was formerly known as Guangzhou Pearl River Real Estate Co. Guangzhou Pearl River Industrial Development Co., Ltd. was founded in 1985 and is based in Guangzhou, China.
